CustomField.description: Normalised version of the contact phone field to help identify duplicate contacts
CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(Phone), NULL, SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE(Phone," ",""), "-",""), "(",""), ")",""), "+",""), ".","") )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Normalised version of the contact phone field to help identify duplicate contacts
CustomField.label: Normalised Phone
